items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step titled 'Validate persona scenario #3' requires deterministic validation of the scenario behavior related to anti-phishing education in the UI. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific outcomes or results from this simulation, nor does it confirm whether the expected result was achieved. As such, it is unclear if the scenario behavior is supported or if it produced a failure report, leading to an inconclusive status.
